raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave: A Digital Savings Account that Automates Wealth Growth**

NovaPay SmartSave is set to revolutionize the way urban millennials and first-time investors grow their wealth. This innovative digital savings account automatically sweeps idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering higher returns than traditional savings accounts.

For years, urban professionals have been looking for ways to save money without sacrificing liquidity. With NovaPay SmartSave, this concern is a thing of the past. The product's auto-sweep technology, which kicks in when balances exceed ₹10,000, invests idle cash into SEBI-approved liquid funds. This ensures that customers can access their money within 30 minutes, 24/7.

**Higher Returns with Instant Liquidity**

Unlike traditional savings accounts, NovaPay SmartSave offers returns that outperform the norm. While savings account interest stands at a steady 4% per annum (as regulated by the RBI), liquid funds have historically averaged between 6.5-7.2% per annum over the last three years, according to AMFI data. This means customers can earn significantly higher returns without having to sacrifice liquidity.

One of the standout features of NovaPay SmartSave is its user-friendly interface and real-time portfolio dashboard. Investors can track their portfolios in real-time, making it easier to stay on top of their wealth growth. Additionally, the product's integrated UPI payments feature ensures seamless transactions.

**Configurable Auto-Sweep Threshold**

To cater to diverse customer needs, NovaPay SmartSave offers a configurable auto-sweep threshold between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000. This means customers can choose when they want to invest their idle balances, giving them complete control over their wealth growth. The minimum balance requirement is a mere ₹1,000, making it accessible to first-time investors.

**Partnership with SBM Bank India**

NovaPay SmartSave's partnership with SBM Bank India provides an additional layer of security and stability. With the RBI banking licence held by SBM Bank India, customers can be assured that their deposits are protected up to ₹5 lakh under the Deposit Insurance Scheme. Furthermore, all mutual fund investments through NovaPay SmartSave are made through AMFI-registered Asset Management Companies (AMCs), ensuring compliance with regulatory norms.

**Get Ready to Grow Your Wealth**

NovaPay SmartSave is poised to revolutionize the way urban millennials and first-time investors grow their wealth. With its innovative auto-sweep technology, user-friendly interface, and partnership with a reputable bank, this product offers a compelling solution for those seeking passive wealth growth.

Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing in any financial product.

**Disclaimer:** The information provided is based on the VERIFIED_FACTS section of the research brief. Please note that past performance is not indicative of future results. Returns may vary depending on market conditions and individual portfolio choices.

hindi_content: नवपे स्मार्टसेव ने शहरी युवाओं और पहले निवेशकों की संपत्ति वृद्धि में बदलाव लाने का एक नए प्रकार का डिजिटल बचत खाता है। यह नवीनतम डिजिटल बचत खाता अपने अस्थायी बैलेंस को SEBI-मान्यता प्राप्त तरल धन संचय में स्वचालित रूप से निवेश करता है, जिससे परंपरागत खातों की तुलना में उच्च वापसी प्रदान करता है। इसने ऑटो-स्वीप तकनीक
tamil_content: நோவாபே சம்மர் சேவ் தனது உருரு மில்லியன்கள் மற்றும் முதல் பங்குதாரர்களின் செலவு வளர்ச்சி மாற்றத்தை நோக்கமாகக் கொண்டுள்ளது. இந்த புதிய சில்லறை சேவை தனது அருகிய மூலதனங்களை SEBI-ஐ ஏற்றுக் கொண்ட நீர்வாழ்க்கை அளிக்கும் திறன் பயன்படுத்தி, சாதாரண அகற்றல்களில் உயர் வருமானங்களை வழங்குகிறது. இந்த சில்லறை அகற்றல் தொழில்நுட்பம்
